text:
Medicare coverage would not be an optional substitute for the services that a facility is 
required to provide by law to its patients or where the services are included in the base 
contract of the facility. An individual's choice to reside in such a facility is also a choice 
to accept the services it holds itself out as offering to its patients. 

B. Day Care Centers and Patient's Place of Residence
